subtitle: The Liquid Light That Bridges Earth and Sky
heroDesc: Named after Selene, the Greek goddess of the moon, selenite glows with an ethereal luminescence that seems to capture moonlight itself. This crystalline form of gypsum radiates a pure, high-frequency energy that cleanses the aura and opens gateways to higher consciousness. Its silky, translucent surface invites you to run your fingers along its ridges and feel the calm that has made it one of the most beloved crystals in spiritual practice.

perspectives.scientific: Selenite is a crystallized variety of gypsum, composed of calcium sulfate dihydrate (CaSO4·2H2O) with a Mohs hardness of just 2, making it one of the softest minerals used in crystal work. It forms in evaporite deposits where ancient saline lakes and seas have dried up over millennia, with major sources located in Mexico, Morocco, Poland, and the United States. The crystal exhibits perfect cleavage in one direction and can be split into thin, transparent sheets. Notably, selenite is water-soluble and must never be immersed in water, as it will begin to dissolve.
perspectives.spiritual: Selenite is intimately linked to the Crown Chakra, serving as a conduit for divine light and higher-dimensional awareness. In metaphysical traditions, it is considered one of the few crystals that never needs cleansing because it continuously self-purifies and charges the stones placed upon it. Associated with the zodiac signs of Taurus, Cancer, and Scorpio, and resonating with the Moon element, selenite is used to open channels of communication with spirit guides, access akashic records, and facilitate out-of-body journeys during meditation.
perspectives.psychological: The soft, pearlescent glow of selenite activates the parasympathetic nervous system, signaling safety and stillness to an anxious mind. In mindfulness practice, holding a selenite wand during breathwork helps anchor wandering thoughts and deepens meditative states. Color psychology associates its translucent white with purity, clarity, and mental reset, making it an ideal companion for those seeking relief from mental clutter, overthinking, or emotional overwhelm.

attributes.origin: Mexico (Naica Mine), Morocco, Poland, United States, Australia, Greece

benefits.title: Aura Cleansing & Purification
benefits.desc: Selenite sweeps away stagnant and negative energy from your auric field like liquid light pouring through every layer of your being. Simply holding or waving a selenite wand around your body can restore energetic clarity in minutes.

benefits.title: Deep Meditative States
benefits.desc: Its high-frequency vibration quiets mental chatter and opens a clear channel to your higher self, making it easier to enter and sustain deep meditation. Practitioners often describe the sensation as floating in a river of white light.

benefits.title: Crown Chakra Activation
benefits.desc: Selenite dissolves the barriers between ordinary awareness and expanded consciousness, stimulating the Crown Chakra to receive wisdom and spiritual downloads. It supports lucid dreaming, astral travel, and connection with angelic realms.

benefits.title: Self-Cleansing Other Crystals
benefits.desc: Place any crystal on a selenite charging plate or beside a selenite tower overnight, and it will be cleared and re-energized without any ritual effort. This makes selenite the ultimate caretaker crystal for any collection.

benefits.title: Emotional Peace & Stress Relief
benefits.desc: The gentle, soothing energy of selenite calms frayed nerves and dissolves tension held in the body, promoting a deep sense of inner peace. It is especially helpful during times of grief, heartbreak, or major life transitions.

benefits.title: Clarity & Decision Making
benefits.desc: By clearing energetic fog and aligning the mind with higher perspective, selenite helps you see situations as they truly are and make decisions from a place of wisdom rather than fear.

benefits.title: Sleep & Dream Enhancement
benefits.desc: Placing selenite on your nightstand creates a tranquil energetic environment that supports restful sleep and vivid, meaningful dreams. Many users report fewer nightmares and a greater sense of waking refreshed.

usageScenes.title: Wear It Daily
usageScenes.desc: Wear a selenite pendant close to your Crown Chakra to maintain a clear, elevated energy field throughout the day. Its gentle vibration acts as a continuous aura cleanser, keeping you centered amid chaotic environments.

usageScenes.title: Meditation Companion
usageScenes.desc: Hold a selenite wand in each hand during seated meditation to amplify your connection to higher realms and accelerate the deepening of your practice. Sweep the wand above your body before and after sessions to clear residual energy.

usageScenes.title: Home Sanctuary
usageScenes.desc: Place selenite towers in the four corners of a room to create a protective grid of white light that continuously purifies the space. A selenite charging plate on your altar keeps all nearby crystals cleansed and activated.

usageScenes.title: Ritual & Ceremony
usageScenes.desc: Use selenite to open sacred space by drawing an energetic circle with a wand before ritual work. Incorporate it into full moon ceremonies to honor its lunar namesake, or place it on your Third Eye during energy healing sessions.

pairings.name: Black Tourmaline
pairings.why: Black Tourmaline grounds and shields while selenite elevates and purifies, creating a complete energetic system that keeps you both protected and spiritually open. Together they form the ultimate cleansing duo for any space.

pairings.name: Amethyst
pairings.why: Both stones resonate with higher spiritual frequencies and the Crown Chakra, amplifying meditative depth and intuitive clarity. Amethyst adds a layer of spiritual protection that complements selenite's pure light.

pairings.name: Clear Quartz
pairings.why: Clear Quartz amplifies selenite's already potent cleansing energy, creating a powerful programmable combination for intention-setting and manifestation work. The pairing magnifies clarity and focus to their highest potential.

relatedCrystals.name: Moonstone
relatedCrystals.benefit: Intuition, feminine energy, and new beginnings

relatedCrystals.name: Howlite
relatedCrystals.benefit: Calming the mind and promoting restful sleep

faqs.title: Can selenite get wet?
faqs.content: No, selenite must never be immersed in water. As a form of gypsum (calcium sulfate dihydrate), it is water-soluble and will dissolve, crack, or become permanently damaged. To cleanse selenite, simply wipe it with a dry or slightly damp cloth, or place it under moonlight.

faqs.title: Does selenite need to be cleansed?
faqs.content: Selenite is one of the few crystals considered self-cleansing. Its naturally high vibration continuously clears and recharges itself, which is why it is widely used to cleanse other crystals. You can optionally place it under moonlight to refresh its energy, but no regular cleansing ritual is necessary.

faqs.title: How do I use a selenite wand for aura cleansing?
faqs.content: Hold the selenite wand a few inches above your body and slowly sweep it from the top of your head down to your feet, visualizing white light dissolving any dark or heavy energy. Repeat this motion three to five times, paying extra attention to areas that feel tense or blocked.

faqs.title: What is the difference between selenite and satin spar?
faqs.content: In the crystal market, most items labeled 'selenite' are actually satin spar, a fibrous variety of gypsum with a silky, chatoyant sheen. True selenite is transparent and plate-like. Both share the same chemical composition and metaphysical properties, though satin spar is far more commonly available and affordable.

faqs.title: Where should I place selenite in my home?
faqs.content: Place selenite towers or bowls near entryways to keep negative energy from entering your space, on your nightstand for peaceful sleep, or on your desk to maintain mental clarity during work. Creating a grid of selenite in the four corners of a room establishes a continuously purified energetic boundary.
